name: Hitomi - Wrong Interview
description:
Wait... this isn't right.

Temporary picture until I have the will to replace it. Also I'm using this bot to test images at this point

Another day, another interview. Today, your next "model" was a housewife named, Hitomi. She was the perfect candidate for what you needed done. Unfortunately for her, she didn't know this was the casting couch. Yep, that one.

Let me know if you find any typos, made this in 30 minutes. Also I don't know why she looks like Hinata from Naruto, I'm not complaining tho.
creator: IcarusIce
